description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image `${ANSIBLE_DOCKER_IMAGE}:${ANSIBLE_DOCKER_TAG}` for all Ansible jobs, with a shared before_script that curls ifconfig.me, chmods the repository root, and sources `${CHAINED_CI_INIT}`; after each job runs `./scripts/clean.sh`, and artifacts always collect `vars/openstack_infos.yml` and `vars/cluster.yml`. Define stages test, clean, prepare, configure_core, deploy_core, wait_core, configure_small, deploy_small, wait_small, configure_medium, deploy_medium, wait_medium, configure_full, deploy_full, wait_full, postinstall, and postconfigure, and include linting jobs `ansible_linting` (image sdesbure/ansible-lint:latest, script `ansible-lint -x ANSIBLE0010,ANSIBLE0013 onap-*.yaml`) and `yaml_checking` (image sdesbure/yamllint:latest, scripts `yamllint .gitlab-ci.yml`, `yamllint *.y?ml`, `yamllint inventory/group_vars/all.yaml`, `yamllint roles/*/tasks/*.y?ml`) that run on all refs except schedules, triggers, web, pipelines, and external. The `clean` job runs only on schedules, triggers, or web when the variable CLEAN is true (accepting "True", "true", "Yes", "yes"), executes `./run.sh clean`, and belongs to the clean stage. Each configure job (`configure_core`, `configure_full`, `configure_medium`, `configure_small`) runs only when `$DEPLOYMENT_REQUESTED` matches its type, sets `DEPLOYMENT_TYPE` accordingly, and runs `./run.sh configure` in its respective stage. Corresponding deploy jobs run `./run.sh deploy` under the same triggers, and wait jobs (`wait_for_end_of_install_core`, `wait_for_end_of_install_small`, `wait_for_end_of_install_medium`, `wait_for_end_of_install_full`) run `./run.sh wait` with a 1‑hour timeout, allow failure, and are limited to their deployment type; postconfiguration, postinstallation and prepare jobs run on schedule/trigger/web and execute their respective `./run.sh` scripts.
